## Harp Account Management & Authentication System - Project Structure

## 📁 Root Directory
```
harp-accounts/
├── 📄 README.md                           # Project documentation
├── 📄 PLAN.md                            # Implementation plan
├── 📄 implementation-plan.md              # Progress tracking
├── 📄 PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md               # This file
├── 📄 package.json                       # Dependencies and scripts
├── 📄 package-lock.json                  # Lock file
├── 📄 yarn.lock                          # Yarn lock file
├── 📄 tsconfig.json                      # TypeScript configuration
├── 📄 next.config.ts                     # Next.js configuration
├── 📄 next-env.d.ts                      # Next.js types
├── 📄 eslint.config.mjs                  # ESLint configuration
├── 📄 postcss.config.mjs                 # PostCSS configuration
├── 📄 components.json                    # ShadCN UI configuration
├── 📄 .gitignore                         # Git ignore rules
├── 📁 .next/                             # Next.js build output
├── 📁 .git/                              # Git repository
├── 📁 .cursor/                           # Cursor IDE configuration
├── 📁 node_modules/                      # Dependencies
├── 📁 public/                            # Static assets
└── 📁 src/                               # Source code
```

## 📁 Source Code Structure (`src/`)

### 🏗️ App Router (`src/app/`)
```
src/app/
├── 📄 layout.tsx                         # Root layout component
├── 📄 page.tsx                           # Home page
├── 📄 globals.css                        # Global styles
├── 📄 globals copy.css                   # Backup global styles
├── 📄 favicon.ico                        # Site favicon
├── 📁 api/                               # API routes
│   └── 📁 auth/                          # Authentication API
│       ├── 📁 [...nextauth]/             # NextAuth.js routes
│       │   └── 📄 route.ts               # NextAuth configuration
│       └── 📁 proxy/                     # API proxy middleware
│           └── 📄 route.ts               # Proxy to external API
├── 📁 auth/                              # Authentication pages
│   ├── 📄 layout.tsx                     # Auth layout wrapper
│   ├── 📁 login/                         # Login page
│   │   └── 📄 page.tsx                   # Login form page
│   ├── 📁 signup/                        # Registration page
│   │   └── 📄 page.tsx                   # Signup form page
│   └── 📁 verify/                        # OTP verification page
│       └── 📄 page.tsx                   # OTP verification page
├── 📁 profile/                           # User profile pages (planned)
│   ├── 📄 page.tsx                       # Profile management page
│   └── 📁 kyc/                           # KYC/KYB page
│       └── 📄 page.tsx                   # KYC form page
├── 📁 reset-password/                    # Password reset (planned)
│   └── 📄 page.tsx                       # Password reset page
└── 📁 set-password/                      # Set password (planned)
    └── 📄 page.tsx                       # Set password page
```

src/components/

    ├── 📄 dropdown-menu.tsx              # Dropdown menus

    ├── 📄 hover-card.tsx                 # Hover tooltips
    ├── 📄 input.tsx                      # Text input
    ├── 📄 input-otp.tsx                  # OTP input
    ├── 📄 label.tsx                      # Form labels
    ├── 📄 menubar.tsx                    # Menu bar
    ├── 📄 navigation-menu.tsx            # Navigation menu
    ├── 📄 pagination.tsx                 # Page navigation
    ├── 📄 popover.tsx                    # Popover content
    ├── 📄 progress.tsx                   # Progress bars
    ├── 📄 radio-group.tsx                # Radio buttons
    ├── 📄 resizable.tsx                  # Resizable panels

    ├── 📄 sonner.tsx                     # Toast notifications

    ├── 📄 textarea.tsx                   # Multi-line input
    ├── 📄 toggle.tsx                     # Toggle button
    ├── 📄 toggle-group.tsx               # Toggle group
    └── 📄 tooltip.tsx                    # Tooltips
